---
title: "DPmixGPD"
---

# DPmixGPD Landing

DPmixGPD bundles the Dirichlet Process mixture of generalized Pareto distributions, the NIMBLE kernels that support it, and a cookbook of curated workflows. Use this landing page to jump to the section you need.

## Quick links

- [Package manual](articles/manual.html) — the pantry-style overview of the core API.
- [Cookbook workflows](cookbook/index.html) — curated vignettes that walk through common modeling scenarios.
- [Kernels reference](kernels/index.html) — kernel-specific introductions and definitions.
- [Reference docs](reference/index.html) — auto-generated help pages for every exported function.
- [Roadmap](roadmap.html) — planned enhancements and research directions.

## Highlights

### Pantry
- [Introduction](articles/introduction.html)
- [Distributions overview](articles/distributions.html)
- [Model specification](articles/model-spec.html)
- [MCMC workflow](articles/mcmc-workflow.html)
- [Unconditional, conditional, and causal guides](articles/unconditional.html)

### Chef Specials
- [Umbrella customization](articles/Customization/umbrella.html)
- [Build NIMBLE from scratch](articles/Customization/customization.html)

### Coverage and Reference
- [Coverage report](coverage/index.html)
- [S3 methods guide](articles/reference-s3.html)
